channel.title: StudyNova Blog
channel.description: Evidence-based study systems, productivity hacks, and templates to help students achieve a 4.0 GPA without burning out.

item.title: Active Recall: The Most Effective Study Technique Supported by Science
item.description: Highlighting notes doesn't work. Learn why active recall is the single most powerful strategy to improve your exam scores.

item.title: How to Prevent Academic Burnout (Without Dropping Your GPA)
item.description: Hustle culture is a lie. Learn how to structure your semester to prevent burnout, get 8 hours of sleep, and still maintain straight A's.

item.title: The Ultimate 7-Day Exam Revision System
item.description: Winging the final is a recipe for disaster. Learn the exact 7-day study schedule used by top-tier students to ace midterms without cramming.

item.title: The Math Behind a 4.0: How to Reverse-Engineer Your Semester GPA
item.description: Stop guessing what you need on the final exam. Learn how to calculate your grades mathematically so you can study smarter, not harder.

item.title: The Perfect Morning Routine for College Students
item.description: Stop hitting snooze. Learn how a simple 30-minute morning routine can prime your brain for deep work and destroy procrastination.

item.title: The Cornell Notes Method: Take Notes That Actually Help You Study
item.description: Are your notes just a transcription of the lecture? Learn how to use the Cornell method to turn your notes into an active recall study guide.

item.title: How to Stop Procrastinating: The 5-Minute Rule
item.description: Procrastination isn't a time management problem; it's an emotion management problem. Learn how to trick your brain into starting hard tasks.

item.title: The Ultimate Guide to the Pomodoro Technique for College Students
item.description: Why studying for 4 hours straight is ruining your grades. Learn how to use the 25-minute Pomodoro method to enter deep work and memorize faster.

item.title: Spaced Repetition: The Secret to Memorizing Anything (Permanently)
item.description: Stop rereading your notes. Learn the science of the Ebbinghaus Forgetting Curve and how spaced repetition can guarantee you never forget an exam answer again.

item.title: How to Create a Study Schedule That Actually Works (And Prevents Burnout)
item.description: Stop relying on motivation. Learn how to build a foolproof weekly study schedule using time blocking, Pomodoro timers, and strategic review systems.
